New Zealand's Trusted Provider of Furniture and Appliance Rental Solutions for over 20 years.

Whether it's appliance rentals, furniture rentals, or any product you are wanting to rent — Mr. Rental has you covered.

With same day approval on most applications, and next day delivery to most locations, we make it super quick and easy.

The Mr. Rental range of products has the solution to suit your budget and lifestyle.
